articles.title: Triptii Dimri reveals what she admires most about Madhuri Dixit
articles.description: Triptii Dimri has opened up about her experience of working with veteran star Madhuri Dixit, showering praise on the actress for her humility, kindness and grounded nature. During a recent interaction for their upcoming project, Triptii said that getting to know Madhuri personally made her admire the iconic actress even more.

articles.title: IShowSpeed’s new World Cup anthem ‘Champions’ has fans calling it FIFA 2026’s unofficial song
articles.description: IShowSpeed has launched a new football song titled Champions. The track is for the upcoming 2026 FIFA World Cup. It has quickly gained massive online attention. Fans are strongly supporting Champions to become the official World Cup anthem. The music video has already garnered significant views. This song celebrates the global nature of the tournament.

articles.title: Ebola cases in Congo near 300 as stories from recovered medical workers stir hope
articles.description: At least 282 cases of Ebola disease have been confirmed in Congo's growing outbreak, the central African nation says, as more joyful stories from recovered medical workers emerge. One nurse spoke of his "indescribable joy" at beating the illness.

articles.description: Pop icon Kylie Minogue, 58, is embracing her single status, prioritizing self-worth over settling. Having learned from past relationships, particularly a painful encounter with a narcissist, she's now exceptionally discerning. Minogue fondly recalls her profound connection with the late Michael Hutchence, acknowledging its lasting impact on her life.

articles.title: It’s high time we talk about the queer community, says Sai Deodhar
articles.description: Sai Deodhar is directing her first feature film. This family drama explores a sister coming out as queer. The film aims to encourage conversations within Indian homes. Deodhar drew inspiration from her own upbringing. She believes it is time for open discussions about LGBTQIA+ identities.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Jennifer Aniston: “Most of us fall in love with... – Inspiring lessons on relationships, intimacy, acceptance, and why it's easy to fall in love but harder to stay by the acclaimed actress known for her iconic role in Friends and her deep insights on love and human nature
articles.description: Quote of the Day by Jennifer Aniston: Jennifer Aniston’s quote, “Most of us fall in love with someone's persona and spend the next three to five years discovering who that person really is...” explores the idea that real love is a journey of discovery, patience, and emotional honesty. The quote suggests that relationships often begin with an idealized version of a person, but over time, true connection is built by understanding their real personality, flaws, and vulnerabilities.

articles.title: Twinkle Khanna shares a thoughtful life lesson; Encourages fans to travel lighter beyond suitcases
articles.description: Twinkle Khanna is inspiring followers to travel light, both physically and emotionally, drawing parallels to airline baggage. She humorously shared her journey of learning guitar, now tutored by her 12-year-old daughter Nitara, who offers 'condescending looks' for wrong notes. This reflects a common parenting shift, where children become teachers.

articles.title: Veteran singer Suman Kalyanpur passes away at 89, leaders pay tribute

articles.title: Qutub Minar’s iconic 1600-year-old iron pillar is still completely rust-free. IITians decode the ancient science behind it’s evergreen surface
articles.description: A 1600-year-old iron pillar in New Delhi remains remarkably rust-free, baffling scientists for centuries. Researchers discovered its resilience stems from its wrought iron composition, high phosphorus content, and a unique forge welding technique. A protective layer of misawite on its surface further shields it from environmental degradation.
